capability: Apply code-beats-docs and record cited evidence with the correct status

checklist.criterion: Verifies each headline claim against source, not README copy
Records Neo4j support as confirmed with a source-code permalink
Records the unbenchmarked 96% claim as caveated/OPEN, not confirmed
Confirmed status requires a source-code/official-docs/release source
Uses commit-SHA permalinks with verbatim quote and checkedOn; no fabrication
